lines.speaker: Julie
lines.text: Oh dear! Oh dear! I don't have time to chat!

sections.title: Opening Bedroom door without Priest gown equipped

lines.speaker: Julie
lines.text: Please leave my husband alone. He's very sick, and I don't want anyone bothering him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry to hear that. Is there anything I can do?

lines.speaker: Julie
lines.text: Thank you, but I just want him to see a priest.
